user_query: what is the remote work policy?
final_answer_preview:
Here’s the Remote Work Policy (Remote Work Policy 2025, last updated 2025-01-10):

- Model: Hybrid-first work model.
- Remote work limit: Employees may work remotely up to 3 days per week.
- Home office budget: €500 one-time; €100 per year recurring.
- In-office anchor days: Tuesday and Thursday are mandatory in-office days.
- International remote work: Allowed for up to 30 days per year with mana
